---
name: Playwright Question
about: Ask a Playwright question or suggest an experiment
title: "[Question] "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## 👋 Welcome

This repository exists to help the community **understand Playwright behaviour through real examples and experiments**.

If something here helped you in your automation journey, feel free to share a quick note. It is always appreciated.

---

# 1️⃣ What behaviour are you seeing?

Describe what Playwright is doing.

Examples:

- a page does not load
- an element cannot be found
- navigation works in a normal browser but not in Playwright
- tests behave differently in CI

Short descriptions are perfectly fine.

---

# 2️⃣ What did you expect to happen?

Example:

> I expected Playwright to navigate to the page and display the login form.

---

# 3️⃣ What actually happened?

If you can, include things like:

- error message
- screenshot
- video
- logs

Helpful signals (if known):

```
Status code of the page request:
Final URL after navigation:
Error message:
```

---

# 4️⃣ What do you think might be causing this? (optional)

Sometimes your intuition can help point the investigation in the right direction.

---

# 5️⃣ Your environment (helps a lot)

If you know these details, they can make debugging much easier.

| Item | Value |
|-----|------|
| Playwright version | |
| Language | (JavaScript / TypeScript / Python / Java / .NET etc.) |
| Browser | (Chromium / Chrome / Firefox / WebKit) |
| Headless or headed | |
| Operating system | |

---

# 6️⃣ Small code example (very helpful)

If possible, share the smallest Playwright snippet that shows the behaviour.

Example:

```
navigate to a page
perform an action
observe the result
```

If the application is private, a simplified example is perfectly fine.

---

# 7️⃣ Anything else that might help

Examples:

- works in Selenium but not Playwright
- works in a normal browser but not automation
- happens only in CI
- happens only in headless mode
